title: CMO-009 scheduler-installer prints but never installs
source_context: Discovered while diagnosing CMO-022 PowerBI freshness bug. Triggered cascade: stale data since 2026-05-11, false confidence in Don's memos for 3 weeks.
description: CMO-009 ('scheduled tasks voor 4 cadansen') was marked done. Stan diagnosis on 2026-06-01 (CMO-022): scripts/schedule_setup.py prints MCP-payloads for mcp__scheduled-tasks__create_scheduled_task but never invokes the MCP tool. Result: 0 jobs were ever scheduled. Cache went stale for 20 days before anyone noticed. Acceptance criteria validated 'output prints' instead of 'job is loaded in launchd/cron'.
proposed_changes: Pattern issue: 'done' criteria for scheduler/cron/launchd tickets must include a runtime verification step (e.g. 'launchctl list | grep <label>' or 'crontab -l | grep <pattern>') not just 'script executes without error'. Add to ticket-creation template a scheduler-specific AC checklist.
